name: GOLFTEC Irvine
address: 18021 Sky Park Cir Suite E1, Irvine, CA 92614
about: GOLFTEC Irvine is a golf training studio specializing in technology-driven instruction, club fitting, and practice. The facility utilizes advanced motion analysis systems like OPTIMOTION, high-speed video, and launch monitors to provide personalized coaching and feedback. Services are available for players of all skill levels, focusing on data-driven improvement through structured lesson programs and club fitting. The studio is part of a national brand with a reputation for PGA-certified coaches and a comprehensive approach to golf development.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized game plans with data-driven swing analysis
Access to advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
PGA-certified coaching with structured improvement strategies

simulator_hardware.notes: Training bays equipped with launch monitors and video feedback systems

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, though you're welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not specified, but the facility does not mention an on-site kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulator play time isn't specified, as GOLFTEC focuses on lessons and practice rather than full rounds.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Junior programs and youth coaching are available, but specific child amenities or policies are not detailed.
